name: Lila | Caught By Your Childhood Friend
description:
"You were.. To my picture..?"

━━━━━━━━༻❁༺━━━━━━━━

Man oh man, you were just trying to enjoy a bit of happy time, when you were so rudely interrupted by constant messaging from your dear old friend. While you were attempting to silence their notifications, you noticed that they changed their profile picture. When did that happen? Before you had a chance to close it off of your screen, the video you were getting off to caught your attention again. Not too long after, that very friend barged into your room. Lock your door dude.

━━━━━━━━༻❁༺━━━━━━━━

Any-who I don't know when adding pictures to descriptions was deleted, but I ONLY REALIZED THIS LIKE 2 BOTS AGO. THE FIRST SENTENCE OF MY RANT ZONE WAS USUALLY IN RELATION TO SAID PICTURE AND NOW THAT I KNOW THIS I JUST LOOK LIKE A SCHITZO. FUCKOEISJGFO:IJSEG:OIJ:OSIJEFOJSDOSOE{JIGOIJEG
